scripts.build: npm run build -w @mcpjam/sdk && npm run build -w @mcpjam/cli && npm run build -w @mcpjam/inspector
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @mcpjam/sdk && npm run build -w @mcpjam/cli
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @mcpjam/sdk && npm run build -w @mcpjam/sdk && npm run typecheck -w @mcpjam/cli
scripts.test: npm run check:mcp-v1-runtime-imports && npm run test:ordered
scripts.test:ordered: npm run test -w @mcpjam/sdk && npm run test:packaging -w @mcpjam/sdk && npm run test -w @mcpjam/cli && npm run test -w @mcpjam/inspector
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build:inspector
